Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

Do you enjoy gossip?

Social · asked by user [] · 2008-04-23 · 5 answers
Lets be honest and hear if one really enjoys it or not. Any open minds out there?
user [33] · 2008-04-23
I do not enjoy gossip.
user [279] · 2008-04-23
How can there be enjoyment in gossip ? Maybe it was the way i was reared, my mother never engaging in gossip of any kind and avoiding hearing it as far as possible. I have allowed it in dealing with my mundane siblings bbut recently have been looking at it all quite differently. But i can honestly say for me there is no enjoyment in gossip. BUT, i have noticed in myself that if a sibling who has been so opposed to me, my life and choices ( and most strongly against my "religion" all this time) come into difficulty, a strange one-up-man attitude. Srila Bhaktivenoda Thakur ( if memory serves ) writes about this in one song of his Saranagati.... I just tried to quickly find it but could not.. But to my memory, it was about "taking pleasure in others unhappiness"... Well, i have gotten off topic and apologise. Hare Krsna !
user [19] · 2008-04-23
yes, gossip about krishna and the gopis...
:)
user [33] · 2008-04-23
[quote][cite] abhiram:[/cite]yes, gossip about krishna and the gopis...
:)[/quote]

thats not called gossip.
user [296] · 2008-06-09
No, not really. I find it causes pain to the heart.
